patterns.message: FND-01 — NiiVue is client-side only. MRI data must never reach a Node.js route. If you need region metadata server-side, use atlas-mcp instead.
FND-01 — React Three Fiber / three.js is client-side only. Server routes must not import 3D primitives.
FND-01 — imaging modules are browser-only. Server routes must not parse DICOM or NIfTI.
